projects.name: Ellis App
projects.description: Designed to help volunteers at organizations like YWAM to better track and refer unhoused folks to social services in SF. What started as a pro-bono venture has now evolved into a fully funded client project, thanks to Geo Browser's interest in using their blockchain technology for the app's backend.

projects.name: Cedar Grove Carbon Trust
projects.description: Cedar Grove partners with leading organizations to acquire the best carbon credits at the best prices. Donations fund projects that save crucial natural ecosystems, repair damage, and protect against future harm. Projects must demonstrate real impact, as measured by strict criteria and expert review. The Foundation holds in credits in the Donor's name.

projects.name: Net Project
projects.description: The Net Project is a research-informed 501(c)(3) nonprofit dedicated to helping people live meaningful and flourishing lives.

projects.name: FantasySCOTUS
projects.description: A complete redesign of https://fantasyscotus.net/ for the modern world. The Mobile App reworks the research survey to become more like a gamified crowdsourcing mechanism for the outcomes of Supreme Court cases

projects.name: Pathways for Stanford
projects.description: This project was designed to help minority and disadvantaged pre-med students connect with mentors, and also to help track Pathways alumni who support students pursuing careers in medicine.

projects.name: GPSA for Stanford
projects.description: I helped a professor improve a scientific Python library used for statistical alignment of biological and spatial samples — such as tissue or skin — either to a reference or to one another, as well as for estimating signal patterns at different points within those samples. My contributions focused on making the library easier to package and distribute on PyPI, ensuring dependencies installed and loaded correctly, and setting up more reliable ongoing dependency maintenance.

projects.name: Generosity Bay Area
projects.description: An anonymous donations post feed on a Squarespace page, to encourage the community to grow in generosity to causes locally and globally. Users can submit posts of their donations by filling in the onsite form. The live feed displays the recipients and amounts of user's donations, but keeps the donors anonymous.

projects.name: Roo
projects.description: Roo is a restaurant reservation management system. Diners can make reservations, and restaurants can manage reservations.

projects.name: Help One Child Survey
projects.description: This project creates a tablet-friendly voting platform for Help One Child's fundraising events in partnership with CarePortal.

projects.name: AI Advocate
projects.description: AI Advocate is a production web and mobile application for Love Never Fails that helps survivors, allies, advocates, and community members understand California legislation. The app provides curated bill feeds, bilingual plain-language AI summaries, representative lookup, vote-history context, outreach tools, and privacy-conscious Supabase-backed infrastructure. Built with Expo, React Native, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Edge Functions, translations, and row-level security.

projects.name: PlanterPlan
projects.description: PlanterPlan is an ongoing rebuild and modernization of a church-planting project management application. The platform turns a phase-based planning process into structured workflows for project setup, launch timelines, task coordination, team collaboration, reporting, and role-based access. The implementation emphasizes secure Supabase-backed workflows, row-level security, safe schema migration protocols, single-source-of-truth architecture documentation, machine-readable development context, and automated quality gates. Built with React, TypeScript, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Vitest, and Playwright.
